title: String literal case confusion in aggregate query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, age INT CHECK(age >= 0));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE name = 'Alice' OR name = 'alice';
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT name) FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'A%';
key_bug_features: String literal case sensitivity in aggregate queries
